description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a double-cutaway design, finished in a glossy cherry red color. The body features a black pickguard, two humbucker pickups, four control knobs, and a three-way toggle switch. The neck is set-in and extends to a headstock with a distinct open-book shape, displaying a visible logo and six tuning pegs arranged in a 3+3 configuration. The fretboard is dark, likely rosewood or ebony, with dot inlays marking the positions. Chrome hardware is used for the bridge, pickups, and tuning machines, adding a metallic accent to the instrument. The overall design and features are reminiscent of classic Gibson SG models, making it suitable for rock and urban music scenes.
description: A glossy cherry red, double-cutaway electric guitar with chrome hardware, black pickguard, and two humbucker pickups. The headstock features a visible logo and six tuning pegs in a 3+3 layout.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the smooth, contoured cherry red back and neck, with the headstock and tuning pegs visible.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's slim body depth and the protruding hardware components.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the black pickguard, two humbucker pickups, four control knobs, toggle switch, and the logoed headstock.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again emphasizing the thinness of the body and neck, with hardware slightly visible.
attribute_headstock_design: Open-book shape with 3+3 tuning pegs and a visible logo
